title: Insufficient precision of sqlite3_column_text16() for floating point values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_floating_points (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_floating_points (value, description) VALUES (1.23456789, 'High precision float');
INSERT INTO test_floating_points (value, description) VALUES (10000000000.0, 'Scientific notation float');
SELECT STR(value) FROM test_floating_points WHERE id = 1;
SELECT value FROM test_floating_points WHERE value IS NULL OR value < 0.0;
key_bug_features: sqlite3_column_text16() handling of floating point values
